summary: PowerShell code is competent (strict mode, error handling, dependency injection for testability), workflow YAML structure is sound (pinned versions, least-privilege permissions, sensible triggers). However, deliverable is incomplete and non-functional: (1) workflow references './Cleanup.Tests.ps1' which doesn't exist—test step will fail immediately; (2) references 'fixtures/default.json' without provision; (3) task requires 'act-result.txt' artifact; (4) confusing no-op guard clause in Cleanup.ps1 lines 175-179 serves no purpose. Cannot execute as written. Requires test file, fixture setup, and validation via 'act' to meet requirements.
